settings.heading: Track Your Order
settings.subtitle: Check the status of your delivery any time.

settings.heading: How to track your order
settings.content:
The quickest way to check your order is with the tracking link we send by email and SMS once your order ships.

  • Open the tracking link from your shipping confirmation.
  • Or sign in and view your orders from your account.
  • Enter your order number and email in the tracking widget below when it is available.

Order tracking is powered by our tracking app — the live lookup will appear on this page. If you cannot find your order, contact our team and we will locate it for you.
